dailySuggestion.badgeTooltip: This introduction was specially selected for you by our smart system
dailySuggestion.matchingNote: This match was selected based on a deep analysis of your profile, questionnaire responses, and preferences. Our system has learned from successful matches to find the best match for you.
dailySuggestion.cardSubtitle: Every day we search for the best match for you
dailySuggestion.noSuggestionToday: We're searching for your best match. We'll update you as soon as we find one!
dailySuggestion.reminderSubject: ⏰ Your match is still waiting for you
dailySuggestion.reminderBody: We sent you a specially selected match that's still waiting for your response. Take a moment to review it.
dailySuggestion.emailSubject: 💌 A new daily match is waiting for you
dailySuggestion.emailNote: This match was selected by our smart system, which learned your preferences and found a unique match for you.
dailySuggestion.emptyDescription: Our system is working around the clock to find your perfect match. We'll update you the moment we find one!
dailySuggestion.howItWorksText: Every day, our smart system scans hundreds of profiles and selects the best match for you, based on your profile, questionnaire responses, and stated preferences.

expectations.title: What to Know About Automatic Suggestions
expectations.intro: To make your experience as smooth as possible, here are a few important things to know:
expectations.notExclusiveDesc: This suggestion may also be sent to other candidates at the same time. The other party may not have seen the suggestion yet and is not reserved for you exclusively.
expectations.availabilityNoteDesc: There is no guarantee that the other party is currently available. They may be in the process of considering another suggestion or temporarily unavailable.
expectations.firstToRespondDesc: When multiple candidates receive a similar suggestion, priority is given to the first to respond. We recommend not waiting too long.
expectations.matchmakerInvolvedDesc: Although this suggestion was sent automatically, your matchmaker is overseeing the process and has approved this match. Feel free to reach out to them with any questions.
expectations.noObligationDesc: If this suggestion isn't right for you, that's perfectly fine. A respectful decline helps us refine future suggestions for you.
expectations.processStep1: Our system identifies a potential match and sends it to your matchmaker for approval
expectations.processStep2: After your matchmaker approves, the suggestion is sent to you for review
expectations.processStep3: If you approve, your matchmaker will forward the suggestion to the other party
expectations.processStep4: If both sides approve, contact details will be exchanged with your matchmaker's guidance
expectations.parallelNote: Please note: You may receive multiple suggestions throughout the week. Each suggestion stands on its own and there's no need to choose between them immediately.
expectations.responseTimeNote: We recommend responding within 3 days to keep the suggestion relevant.
expectations.emailDisclaimer: This suggestion was selected by our system and approved by your matchmaker. Remember: suggestions are not exclusive, the other party may be receiving other suggestions as well, and priority is given to those who respond first.

toggle.label: Auto Suggestions
toggle.encourageEnable: Enable to receive personalized AI-powered match suggestions
infoItems: The system scans and finds quality matches using AI
Suggestions are sent on Sundays and Wednesdays
After you approve, a human matchmaker guides the process
The system learns from your responses and improves over time
toggle.infoFooter: You can turn this on/off anytime. When off, suggestions come only from a matchmaker.

autoSuggestions.title: Smart Suggestions
autoSuggestions.subtitle: Our system learns from your responses and improves suggestions
autoSuggestions.scheduleInfo: Match suggestions are sent on Sundays and Wednesdays

autoSuggestions.waitingForSuggestion: Our system is working to find the best match for you

statusDescriptions.draft: The matchmaker is preparing the suggestion.
statusDescriptions.pendingFirstPartyUser: The suggestion awaits your decision - approve, decline, or save to backup.

statusDescriptions.firstPartyApprovedUser: You approved the suggestion - it will now be sent to the other party.
statusDescriptions.firstPartyApprovedOther: The first party enthusiastically approved the suggestion.
statusDescriptions.firstPartyDeclinedUser: You declined the suggestion - thank you for the honest feedback.

statusDescriptions.secondPartyDeclinedUser: The other party decided the suggestion was not a good fit.
statusDescriptions.secondPartyDeclinedOther: You declined the suggestion - thank you for the honest feedback.
statusDescriptions.secondPartyNotAvailableUser: The other side is not available right now. The suggestion will resume when they are. In the meantime, you can approve other suggestions.
statusDescriptions.secondPartyNotAvailableOther: You marked yourself as not available. When you're ready, the suggestion will be waiting.
statusDescriptions.reOfferedToFirstPartyUser: The other side is now available and approved! Is this still relevant for you?
statusDescriptions.reOfferedToFirstPartyOther: The suggestion has been re-sent to the first party for approval.
statusDescriptions.awaitingMatchmakerApproval: Both parties have approved - the matchmaker will confirm the sharing of details.
statusDescriptions.contactDetailsShared: Your contact details have been shared - it's time to get in touch!
statusDescriptions.awaitingFirstDateFeedback: Great that you met! We'd love to hear how it went.
statusDescriptions.thinkingAfterDate: Time to process the meeting and decide on the next steps.
statusDescriptions.proceedingToSecondDate: Excellent! You both want to continue getting to know each other.
statusDescriptions.endedAfterFirstDate: You've decided not to proceed - that's perfectly fine.
statusDescriptions.meetingPending: The matchmaker is coordinating a first meeting.
statusDescriptions.meetingScheduled: The first meeting has been scheduled - good luck!
statusDescriptions.matchApproved: The match has been officially approved - congratulations!
statusDescriptions.matchDeclined: The match was not approved to proceed.
statusDescriptions.dating: You are both in an active dating process.
statusDescriptions.engaged: Engaged! 💍 Mazel Tov on your engagement! What a joy!

header.title: An Introduction, With You in Mind
header.subtitleLine1: When we came across this profile, we immediately thought of you.
header.subtitleLine2: Here's why we believe this could be the start of something meaningful.
header.matchStorySubtitle1: We listen to what's important to you, even between the lines.
header.matchStorySubtitle2: Here are some of the connections we identified.
header.whatsNextTitle: What's Next? The Decision is Yours
header.whatsNextSubtitle1: Every decision you make is the right step on your journey.
header.whatsNextSubtitle2: Take your time and choose what feels right to you.

askMatchmaker.title: A Question for {{name}}
askMatchmaker.description: Your matchmaker is here to answer any questions you have about this introduction.
askMatchmaker.errorSubmitting: An error occurred while sending your question. Please try again.

topicSelect.title: What would you like to know more about?
topicSelect.subtitle: Select a category to see some sample questions

input.label: Your Question
input.placeholder: Write your question here... Your matchmaker will be happy to help.
input.info: Your question will be sent directly and privately to your matchmaker.

values.label: Values & Beliefs
values.description: Questions about worldview and core values
questions: Could you tell me more about their general outlook on life?
How central is religious practice in their daily life?
Are there any core values that are particularly important to them?
How do they view the role of tradition in a modern family?

family.label: Family & Background
questions: How would you describe their family dynamic?
What is their relationship with their family like?
What are their thoughts on building a family of their own?
Is there anything notable about their personal background?

career.label: Career & Ambitions
questions: What are their long-term professional aspirations?
How do they view the balance between career and family life?
What are they passionate about in their work or studies?
Are they settled in their career or exploring new paths?

personality.label: Character & Temperament
questions: How would friends describe their personality?
What are some of their strongest character traits?
Are they more introverted or extroverted?
How do they typically handle stress or challenges?

future.label: Future Plans
future.description: Questions about vision and future goals
questions: What are some of their dreams for the future?
Are they planning to stay in their current location long-term?
What is their general vision for their future family life?
How do they envision their life in the next 5-10 years?

other.label: Something Else
questions: I have a specific question about...

SECOND_PARTY_APPROVED.label: They Approved

SECOND_PARTY_DECLINED.label: They Declined

PROCEEDING_TO_SECOND_DATE.label: Moving to a 2nd Date

ENDED_AFTER_FIRST_DATE.label: Ended After 1st Date

MEETING_PENDING.label: Scheduling Meeting

MEETING_SCHEDULED.label: Meeting Scheduled
MEETING_SCHEDULED.description: A first meeting has been scheduled.

MATCH_APPROVED.label: Match Confirmed
MATCH_APPROVED.description: The match was confirmed by the matchmaker. The process is moving forward.

MATCH_DECLINED.label: Match Declined
MATCH_DECLINED.description: The match was declined by the matchmaker.

MARRIED.label: Married
MARRIED.description: Mazel Tov! The couple is married.

EXPIRED.label: Expired
EXPIRED.description: The time to decide on this introduction has passed.

CLOSED.label: Closed
CLOSED.description: The introduction process has been closed.

CANCELLED.label: Cancelled
CANCELLED.description: This introduction was cancelled by the matchmaker.
